_comment: Versions of pure-Python model libs we maintain as standalone modellibs trees under ~/envs/modellibs/<pkg>-<ver>/. Edit + run tools/bootstrap_modellibs.py to provision missing trees. defaults_per_venv: which modellib tree to use when a torch venv runs without explicit --transformers/--diffusers/--timm CLI flags. Override with CLI flags. Per design/venv-decouple-modellibs.md.
